message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Step 6 is DONE — focus on Step 7">
Step 6 already has 9/9 consensus. Marty approved — he confirmed it multiple times. You are processing stale messages from before your respawn. 

The B2 item is resolved. Step 6 is done. You are now a Reviewer for Step 7. Carson is the Driver and has posted his interaction design proposal. Please stop relitigating Step 6 and focus on Step 7.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Understood -- Step 6 is done, moving on to Step 7. I've already sent Carson my Rust architecture proposal for the `clarify_as_project` service. I'm waiting for his interaction design proposal (Option A) so I can review it. Standing by for Carson's messages.
